quantification.why: Nearly every comparison carries a computed figure, e.g. West 'trailed at $1,414.82, about 65% of North's total' and Sprocket 'moving 238 units... because of its $4.75 price'.

specificity.why: Each recommendation names a product/region with figures and an action, e.g. 'Review Sprocket pricing: 238 units sold... produced only $1,130.50... at $4.75 per unit.'

insight_density.why: Surfaces multiple non-obvious observations like the Sprocket volume/revenue inversion, West's single Gadget order versus two elsewhere, and Gadget's high-price/low-volume revenue lead.

quantification.why: Nearly every comparison carries a computed figure — e.g. West 'trailed at $1,414.82, about 65% of North's total' and Sprocket's '238 units... only $1,130.50... $4.75 per unit'.

specificity.why: Each recommendation names a product/region with figures and an action, e.g. 'Review Sprocket pricing: 238 units sold... produced only $1,130.50, the lowest product revenue at $4.75 per unit.'

insight_density.why: It surfaces several non-obvious, actionable observations like Sprocket's highest volume yet lowest revenue and Gadget's low-volume/high-revenue concentration plus West's single Gadget order versus two elsewhere.

quantification.why: Nearly every comparison carries a computed figure, e.g. West is "$1,414.82, about 65% of North's total" and Sprocket's "238 units" yielding "$1,130.50" at "$4.75 per unit."

specificity.why: Each recommendation names a specific region/product with figures, e.g. "Focus sales effort on West, the weakest region ($1,414.82); it placed only one Gadget order versus two in every other region."

insight_density.why: The prose surfaces multiple non-obvious, actionable observations like Gadget's revenue lead from "only 16 units" via its "$149.50 unit price" and Sprocket's high-volume/low-revenue mismatch ("238 units" but "lowest product revenue").
